channel.title: My Little Pony Chinese Podcast
channel.description: NotebookLM-generated discussion of Chinese episodes of My Little Pony
channel.itunes:author: Gerald Pho
channel.itunes:summary: NotebookLM-generated discussion of Chinese episodes of My Little Pony
channel.itunes:subtitle: My Little Pony Chinese Podcast

item.title: MLP S1E1 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 1 | 用派对拯救世界
item.description: Twilight Sparkle arrives in Ponyville to oversee the Summer Sun Celebration, but a forgotten warning about Nightmare Moon turns a routine visit into the start of a larger crisis. In the transcript, the hosts stop to explain five Chinese terms: 梦魇之月 (mèng yǎn zhī yuè), “Nightmare Moon,” a name tied to frightening dreams and the moon; 放逐 (fàng zhú), “banishment” or forced exile; 预言 (yù yán), “prophecy,” a warning spoken in advance; 灭顶之灾 (miè dǐng zhī zāi), a catastrophic disaster overwhelming enough to destroy everything; and 和谐之源 (hé xié zhī yuán), the source or power of harmony that can unite everyone.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight Sparkle arrives in Ponyville to oversee the Summer Sun Celebration, but a forgotten warning about Nightmare Moon turns a routine visit into the start of a larger crisis. In the transcript, the hosts stop to explain five Chinese terms: 梦魇之月 (mèng yǎn zhī yuè), “Nightmare Moon,” a name tied to frightening dreams and the moon; 放逐 (fàng zhú), “banishment” or forced exile; 预言 (yù yán), “prophecy,” a warning spoken in advance; 灭顶之灾 (miè dǐng zhī zāi), a catastrophic disaster overwhelming enough to destroy everything; and 和谐之源 (hé xié zhī yuán), the source or power of harmony that can unite everyone.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E1 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 1 | 用派对拯救世界

item.title: MLP S1E2 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 2 | 用友谊战胜梦魇之月
item.description: Twilight and her new friends journey into the Everfree Forest, recover the Elements of Harmony, and defeat Nightmare Moon, turning a looming disaster into the foundation of their friendship. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 梦魇 (mèng yǎn), a terrifying nightmare; 和谐 (hé xié), harmony among people who work well together; 慷慨 (kāng kǎi), generosity shown by giving something valuable; 忠诚 (zhōng chéng), loyalty that refuses to abandon friends; and 友谊 (yǒu yì), friendship as the bond that makes the group strong.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight and her new friends journey into the Everfree Forest, recover the Elements of Harmony, and defeat Nightmare Moon, turning a looming disaster into the foundation of their friendship. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 梦魇 (mèng yǎn), a terrifying nightmare; 和谐 (hé xié), harmony among people who work well together; 慷慨 (kāng kǎi), generosity shown by giving something valuable; 忠诚 (zhōng chéng), loyalty that refuses to abandon friends; and 友谊 (yǒu yì), friendship as the bond that makes the group strong.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E2 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 2 | 用友谊战胜梦魇之月

item.title: MLP S1E3 | The Ticket Master | 小马宝莉门票里的五个词
item.description: Twilight Sparkle receives two Grand Galloping Gala tickets and watches her friends compete for them, learning how quickly generosity, pressure, and expectations can strain a friendship. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 邀请 (yāo qǐng), “invite” or “invitation”; 庆典 (qìng diǎn), a grand celebration; 跟踪 (gēn zōng), following someone around; 负担 (fù dān), a burden or heavy pressure; and 绝技 (jué jì), a special skill or signature trick.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight Sparkle receives two Grand Galloping Gala tickets and watches her friends compete for them, learning how quickly generosity, pressure, and expectations can strain a friendship. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 邀请 (yāo qǐng), “invite” or “invitation”; 庆典 (qìng diǎn), a grand celebration; 跟踪 (gēn zōng), following someone around; 负担 (fù dān), a burden or heavy pressure; and 绝技 (jué jì), a special skill or signature trick.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E3 | The Ticket Master | 小马宝莉门票里的五个词

item.title: MLP S1E4 | Applebuck Season | 拒绝求助的代价
item.description: Applejack tries to harvest Sweet Apple Acres alone after Big McIntosh is injured, but exhaustion and pride turn her promises to help around Ponyville into a chain of disasters. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 单枪匹马 (dān qiāng pǐ mǎ), doing something single-handedly; 不在状态 (bú zài zhuàng tài), being too tired or off your game; 食物中毒 (shí wù zhòng dú), food poisoning; 固执 (gù zhí), stubbornness; and 自尊心 (zì zūn xīn), pride or self-esteem that can block asking for help.
item.itunes:summary: Applejack tries to harvest Sweet Apple Acres alone after Big McIntosh is injured, but exhaustion and pride turn her promises to help around Ponyville into a chain of disasters. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 单枪匹马 (dān qiāng pǐ mǎ), doing something single-handedly; 不在状态 (bú zài zhuàng tài), being too tired or off your game; 食物中毒 (shí wù zhòng dú), food poisoning; 固执 (gù zhí), stubbornness; and 自尊心 (zì zūn xīn), pride or self-esteem that can block asking for help.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E4 | Applebuck Season | 拒绝求助的代价

item.title: MLP S1E5 | Griffon the Brush Off | 简单词看透社交真相
item.description: Pinkie Pie and Rainbow Dash bond over pranks until Rainbow Dash's rude griffon friend Gilda arrives, forcing Rainbow to decide what kind of friendship she wants to keep. In the transcript, the discussion highlights five Chinese terms: 嫉妒 (jí dù), jealousy; 态度 (tài dù), someone's attitude or manner; 真假 (zhēn jiǎ), what is real versus fake; 自私 (zì sī), selfishness; and 原谅 (yuán liàng), forgiveness after someone has acted badly.
item.itunes:summary: Pinkie Pie and Rainbow Dash bond over pranks until Rainbow Dash's rude griffon friend Gilda arrives, forcing Rainbow to decide what kind of friendship she wants to keep. In the transcript, the discussion highlights five Chinese terms: 嫉妒 (jí dù), jealousy; 态度 (tài dù), someone's attitude or manner; 真假 (zhēn jiǎ), what is real versus fake; 自私 (zì sī), selfishness; and 原谅 (yuán liàng), forgiveness after someone has acted badly.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E5 | Griffon the Brush Off | 简单词看透社交真相

item.title: MLP S1E6 | Boast Busters | 真魔法不用炫耀
item.description: Trixie arrives in Ponyville boasting about her powers, but Twilight shows that real ability matters most when it protects friends from danger. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 魔法 (mó fǎ), magic; 炫耀 (xuàn yào), showing off; 挑战 (tiǎo zhàn), a challenge; 打败 (dǎ bài), to defeat; and 承认 (chéng rèn), to admit or accept a fact.
item.itunes:summary: Trixie arrives in Ponyville boasting about her powers, but Twilight shows that real ability matters most when it protects friends from danger. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 魔法 (mó fǎ), magic; 炫耀 (xuàn yào), showing off; 挑战 (tiǎo zhàn), a challenge; 打败 (dǎ bài), to defeat; and 承认 (chéng rèn), to admit or accept a fact.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E6 | Boast Busters | 真魔法不用炫耀

item.title: MLP S1E7 | Dragonshy | 柔柔竟吼退巨龙
item.description: Fluttershy joins the trip up the mountain to ask a sleeping dragon to move, and the episode turns her fear into a lesson about quiet courage. The Chinese podcast follows how the group reacts to the dragon, how Fluttershy finally speaks up, and how gentle persistence succeeds where force fails.
item.itunes:summary: Fluttershy joins the trip up the mountain to ask a sleeping dragon to move, and the episode turns her fear into a lesson about quiet courage. The Chinese podcast follows how the group reacts to the dragon, how Fluttershy finally speaks up, and how gentle persistence succeeds where force fails.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E7 | Dragonshy | 柔柔竟吼退巨龙

item.title: MLP S1E8 | Look Before You Sleep | 苹果嘉儿与珍奇的雨夜和解
item.description: A storm traps Applejack and Rarity at Twilight Sparkle's library, where their clashing habits turn into cooperation after a fallen tree crashes into the room. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 泥泞 (ní nìng), muddy; 讲究 (jiǎng jiu), particular about details; 赌气 (dǔ qì), acting out from hurt feelings; 合作 (hé zuò), cooperation; and 挑剔 (tiāo ti), being picky or fault-finding.
item.itunes:summary: A storm traps Applejack and Rarity at Twilight Sparkle's library, where their clashing habits turn into cooperation after a fallen tree crashes into the room. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 泥泞 (ní nìng), muddy; 讲究 (jiǎng jiu), particular about details; 赌气 (dǔ qì), acting out from hurt feelings; 合作 (hé zuò), cooperation; and 挑剔 (tiāo ti), being picky or fault-finding.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E8 | Look Before You Sleep | 苹果嘉儿与珍奇的雨夜和解

item.title: MLP S1E9 | Bridle Gossip | 听小马宝莉故事学会不以貌取人
item.description: When Zecora visits Ponyville, fear and gossip spread faster than facts, and the ponies must learn not to judge appearances after Poison Joke exposes their own mistakes. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 无缘无故 (wú yuán wú gù), for no reason; 道听途说 (dào tīng tú shuō), hearsay or rumors; 胡言乱语 (hú yán luàn yǔ), talking nonsense; 超自然 (chāo zì rán), supernatural; and 以貌取人 (yǐ mào qǔ rén), judging people by appearance.
item.itunes:summary: When Zecora visits Ponyville, fear and gossip spread faster than facts, and the ponies must learn not to judge appearances after Poison Joke exposes their own mistakes. In the transcript, the hosts explain five Chinese terms: 无缘无故 (wú yuán wú gù), for no reason; 道听途说 (dào tīng tú shuō), hearsay or rumors; 胡言乱语 (hú yán luàn yǔ), talking nonsense; 超自然 (chāo zì rán), supernatural; and 以貌取人 (yǐ mào qǔ rén), judging people by appearance.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E9 | Bridle Gossip | 听小马宝莉故事学会不以貌取人

item.title: MLP S1E10 | Swarm of the Century | 碧琪用乐器解决昆虫麻烦
item.description: Ponyville prepares for Princess Celestia's visit, but fast-multiplying parasprites eat through the town until Pinkie Pie uses music to lead them away. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 昆虫 (kūn chóng), insect; 麻烦 (má fan), trouble; 魔法 (mó fǎ), magic; 乐器 (yuè qì), musical instrument; and 游行 (yóu xíng), parade.
item.itunes:summary: Ponyville prepares for Princess Celestia's visit, but fast-multiplying parasprites eat through the town until Pinkie Pie uses music to lead them away. In the regenerated transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 昆虫 (kūn chóng), insect; 麻烦 (má fan), trouble; 魔法 (mó fǎ), magic; 乐器 (yuè qì), musical instrument; and 游行 (yóu xíng), parade.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E10 | Swarm of the Century | 碧琪用乐器解决昆虫麻烦

item.title: MLP S1E11 | Winter Wrap Up | 紫悦靠条理拯救春天
item.description: During Ponyville's annual winter clean-up, Twilight Sparkle struggles to help without magic until her talent for planning and coordination becomes exactly what the town needs.
item.itunes:summary: During Ponyville's annual winter clean-up, Twilight Sparkle struggles to help without magic until her talent for planning and coordination becomes exactly what the town needs.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E11 | Winter Wrap Up | 紫悦靠条理拯救春天

item.title: MLP S1E12 | Call of the Cutie | 苹果丽丽找标志
item.description: Apple Bloom becomes desperate to earn her cutie mark before Diamond Tiara's party, fails at a series of borrowed talents, and finally finds friendship with two other fillies who are still searching too. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 标志 (biāo zhì), a sign or mark; 天赋 (tiān fù), an inborn talent; 强求 (qiǎng qiú), forcing something before its time; 嘲笑 (cháo xiào), mocking someone; and 潜力 (qián lì), future potential.
item.itunes:summary: Apple Bloom becomes desperate to earn her cutie mark before Diamond Tiara's party, fails at a series of borrowed talents, and finally finds friendship with two other fillies who are still searching too. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 标志 (biāo zhì), a sign or mark; 天赋 (tiān fù), an inborn talent; 强求 (qiǎng qiú), forcing something before its time; 嘲笑 (cháo xiào), mocking someone; and 潜力 (qián lì), future potential.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E12 | Call of the Cutie | 苹果丽丽找标志

item.title: MLP S1E13 | Fall Weather Friends | 铁小马并列垫底
item.description: Applejack and Rainbow Dash turn a simple argument about fairness into the Iron Pony challenge and then the annual Running of the Leaves, but their obsession with beating each other leaves Twilight to finish ahead of them. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 挑战赛 (tiǎo zhàn sài), a challenge match; 作弊 (zuò bì), cheating; 书呆子 (shū dāi zi), a bookish nerd; 绊倒 (bàn dǎo), tripping someone; and 并列 (bìng liè), tying for the same place.
item.itunes:summary: Applejack and Rainbow Dash turn a simple argument about fairness into the Iron Pony challenge and then the annual Running of the Leaves, but their obsession with beating each other leaves Twilight to finish ahead of them. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 挑战赛 (tiǎo zhàn sài), a challenge match; 作弊 (zuò bì), cheating; 书呆子 (shū dāi zi), a bookish nerd; 绊倒 (bàn dǎo), tripping someone; and 并列 (bìng liè), tying for the same place.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E13 | Fall Weather Friends | 铁小马并列垫底

item.title: MLP S1E14 | Suited for Success | 真奇的礼服风波
item.description: Rarity pours herself into making gala dresses for her friends, but their conflicting demands ruin the designs until they recognize her effort and repair the friendship. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 礼服 (lǐ fú), formal dress; 挑剔 (tiāo ti), picky or hard to satisfy; 时装秀 (shí zhuāng xiù), fashion show; 丢脸 (diū liǎn), losing face or feeling embarrassed; and 原谅 (yuán liàng), to forgive.
item.itunes:summary: Rarity pours herself into making gala dresses for her friends, but their conflicting demands ruin the designs until they recognize her effort and repair the friendship. In the transcript, the hosts review five Chinese terms: 礼服 (lǐ fú), formal dress; 挑剔 (tiāo ti), picky or hard to satisfy; 时装秀 (shí zhuāng xiù), fashion show; 丢脸 (diū liǎn), losing face or feeling embarrassed; and 原谅 (yuán liàng), to forgive.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E14 | Suited for Success | 真奇的礼服风波
